training_status: lifting 5 times per week, 30 mins cardio 5 times per week

benefits.description: Lost 50 lbs over 3 months (from 220 to 170 lbs) with calorie deficit and training
Visible muscle definition after fat loss, visible six-pack when flexing
Gyno improving/flattening down with weight loss

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg per week for 1.5 months, then increased to 2mg (1mg twice weekly). Maintained strict calorie deficit of 1200-1500 calories per day. 2 years inconsistent lifting prior, 1 year break before starting Retatrutide. Pre-existing gyno from previous obesity, not from steroid use. No testosterone or other compounds used.
